examples.title: Basic kill() Usage
examples.description: Parent process sends signal to child process
examples.explanation: Creates child process that waits for signal. Parent sends SIGUSR1 using kill() to terminate child gracefully.

examples.title: raise() Function Demonstration
examples.description: Process sends signal to itself using raise()
examples.explanation: Demonstrates raise() function which sends signal to calling process itself. Useful for graceful self-termination.

examples.title: kill() with signal 0 for process checking
examples.description: Using kill() with signal 0 to check if process exists
examples.explanation: Shows how to use kill() with signal 0 for checking process existence without actually sending a signal.

examples.title: Signal Handling with sigaction
examples.description: Modern way to handle signals using sigaction()
examples.explanation: Demonstrates sigaction() which is the preferred method for signal handling over signal(). It provides more control.
